task_description: Add a feature to automatically create Class 1 through Class 12 for all branches in the system, with duplicate checking and default section allocation. Accessible only to super admin via a button in the classes management view.

verification.summary: Both modified files pass php -l syntax validation. No automated test framework exists in the project. Implementation follows existing CodeIgniter patterns correctly. Review feedback addressed: CSRF protection via POST form, transaction wrapping, deterministic section ordering, and i18n for success message.
